message:
refactor(tui): remove deprecated BrailleActivity widget (br-2bbt.4.4)

- Remove BrailleActivity struct, impl, and Widget implementation (188 lines)
- Remove canvas imports (CanvasRef, Mode, Painter) - only used by BrailleActivity
- Remove BrailleActivity unit tests (4 tests)
- Remove BrailleActivity performance test
- Update module doc comments to remove BrailleActivity reference

Total: 237 lines removed from tui_widgets.rs

Note: ReservationGauge and PercentileRibbon are kept - they provide useful
high-level APIs and already delegate to native ftui widgets internally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
